scenario.name: Basic Sipstone UAC
scenario.send: INVITE sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:6025 SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:[field0]@[field2];tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 INVITE Contact: sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport] Supported: replaces Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Performance Test User-to-User: 00FA080001001056965CFB;encoding=hex Content-Length: 0

ACK sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port];transport=[transport] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:[field0]@[field2];tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port][peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 ACK Contact: sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport] Max-Forwards: 70 [routes] Subject: Performance Test Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=user1 536765 1 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio 41532 RTP/AVP 0 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=sendrecv

SIP/2.0 200 OK [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=[pid]SIPpTag01[call_number] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Av-Global-Session-ID: 00fe2c47-42d9-4801-9379-5b83ad7d0000 Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=user1 536765 2 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio 41538 RTP/AVP 0 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=sendrecv

BYE [$1] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:[field0]@[field2];tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port][peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] Contact: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> CSeq: 3 BYE [routes] Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Performance Test Content-Length: 0
